div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
{
transactionId: string,
userId: string,
type: 'PAYMENT'|'TOPUP'|'REFUND',
amount: number,
status: string,
timestamp: timestamp,
stationId?: string,
routeId?: string,
paymentMethod: string,
metadata: {
deviceId: string,
location: geopoint
}
}
